suggestion.rationale: Both records denote the same organization (STV Inc., an engineering/consulting firm). The identity key 'entity_stv-inc' is shared; the entity type fields ('organization' vs 'consulting firm') are consistent (consulting firm is a subtype of organization). The name 'STV' on the first record is an abbreviation/acronym of the legal name 'STV Inc.' — per entity rule, acronym + expanded legal name merge. The date suffix '-20100615' on the first record makes it a lifecycle record of the durable entity per lifecycle rule. No contradiction exists (test 1 passes), and the same-object test (test 2) allows merge. All evidence supports a single canonical identity.
